zero-trust-adoption.value: 78% of enterprises are accelerating zero-trust programs

deployment-speed.value: Organizations are prioritizing faster threat detection and unified response across the SOC

secure-networking.value: Modern networks require integrated security across campus, branch, and cloud

Cisco Secure Access.summary: Cloud-delivered security that provides secure access to applications and internet destinations with zero-trust principles.

Cisco XDR.summary: Extended detection and response that unifies visibility and accelerates investigation across the security stack.

Cisco Secure Endpoint.summary: Next-generation antivirus and endpoint detection and response for laptops, servers, and mobile devices.

Cisco Duo.summary: Multi-factor authentication and device trust to verify user identity before granting access.

Cisco ISE.summary: Identity-based network access control and policy enforcement across wired, wireless, and VPN.

Cisco Umbrella.summary: Cloud security service that delivers DNS-layer protection and secure web gateway capabilities.

Cisco Firewall.summary: Network firewall platforms for perimeter and data-center segmentation with threat prevention.

Cisco Secure Network Analytics.summary: Network visibility and analytics to detect threats using telemetry from the network infrastructure.

positioning: Cisco Secure Access delivers converged networking and security in a cloud-native model.
Unified policy and visibility across users, devices, and workloads reduces tool sprawl.
Integrated Cisco Security Cloud approach connects network, endpoint, and identity controls.
Cisco provides zero-trust access with integrated network intelligence and identity context.
Secure Access combines SWG, ZTNA, and DNS security in a single policy framework.
Cisco portfolio spans campus, branch, data center, and cloud for consistent enforcement.
Cisco integrates firewall, identity, and network infrastructure under one architecture.
Secure Network Analytics adds behavioral visibility beyond traditional NGFW policies.
Cisco Security Cloud connects detection, response, and access control across the estate.

security-suite.scope: Bundled Cisco security capabilities across access, endpoint, and detection and response.
security-suite.economics: Flexible licensing options aligned to user, device, and workload consumption models.

enterprise-agreement.scope: Enterprise-wide Cisco software and services alignment across networking and security.
enterprise-agreement.economics: Simplified procurement and lifecycle management through an enterprise licensing framework.
